channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MASFIN] MAS Financial Appoints Dhvanil Gandhi as Executive Director of MRHMFL
item.description:
MAS Financial Services Ltd has appointed Mr. Dhvanil Gandhi as the Executive Director of its subsidiary, MAS Rural Housing & Mortgage Finance Limited (MRHMFL). Mr. Gandhi has over a decade of experience with MAS Financial Services, where he strengthened the SME lending business and drove initiatives in the insurance vertical, obtaining an insurance broking license. He is also involved in investor relations and technology initiatives. Mr. Kamlesh Gandhi, Founder, Chairman & Managing Director, stated that this appointment will strengthen the Board and leadership team at MRHMFL.

  • Dhvanil Gandhi appointed Executive Director of MAS Rural Housing & Mortgage Finance Limited.
  • Gandhi has over a decade of experience in SME lending and insurance at MAS Financial.
  • He played a key role in obtaining the insurance broking license.
  • Appointment aims to strengthen the Board and leadership team at MRHMFL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAS Financial Services Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SADHNANIQ] Sadhana Nitro EGM Corrigendum on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd issued a corrigendum to its Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) notice dated April 29, 2026. The corrigendum addresses modifications in the explanatory statement, specifically regarding the floor price for equity share issuance and pre-preferential shareholding details of Niraj Bajaj. The EGM will be held on May 22, 2026, via video conferencing. The corrigendum is available on the company's website.

  • Corrigendum issued for the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting notice dated April 29, 2026.
  • Floor price for equity share issuance modified to ₹2.0272 as per SEBI ICDR Regulations.
  • Niraj Bajaj's pre-preferential shareholding is revised to 14,75,00,000 equity shares.
  • EGM will be held on May 22, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Corrigendum available on the company's website: www.sncl.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SADHANA NITROCHEM LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [QUADFUTURE] Quadrant Future Tek: IPO Fund Utilization Report, Q4 FY26
item.description:
Quadrant Future Tek Ltd has released a monitoring agency report by CARE Ratings Limited regarding the utilization of funds raised through its IPO for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report indicates a deviation from the stated objectives concerning general corporate purposes, as board approval for utilization pertaining to Q4FY26 was obtained after the quarter's end, on April 8, 2026. The range of deviation is up to 10%.

  • CARE Ratings Limited monitored the utilization of IPO funds for Q4 FY26.
  • A deviation from the offer document's objectives was noted regarding general corporate purpose spending.
  • Board approval for Q4 FY26 utilization was ratified after the quarter ended.
  • The deviation in fund utilization is reported to be up to 10%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quadrant Future Tek Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PURVA] Puravankara Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for May 18, 2026
item.description:
Puravankara Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the draft audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results of the Company along with the Statutory Audit Report for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting to be held on May 18, 2026.
  • Consideration of audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Review of the Statutory Audit Report for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Puravankara Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KRITIIND] Kriti Industries: Chandrasekharan Bhaskar's Tenure Ends 12.05.2026
item.description:
Kriti Industries India Ltd. announced the completion of Shri Chandrasekharan Bhaskar's tenure as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective May 12, 2026. This follows two consecutive terms of 5 years each, as per Section 149 of the Companies Act, 2013 and Regulation 17 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company is in the process of filing the necessary information in XBRL format and will host it on their website.

  • Shri Chandrasekharan Bhaskar's tenure as Non-Executive Independent Director ends May 12, 2026.
  • The completion is due to the conclusion of two consecutive 5-year terms.
  • The company is filing the retirement details in XBRL format.
  • Information will be available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRITI INDUSTRIES (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [TCS] TCS Partners with Rezolve Ai for Agentic Commerce
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has formed a global strategic partnership with Rezolve Ai to scale agentic commerce. TCS will enable retail enterprises to leverage Rezolve Ai’s intelligent commerce platform, brainpowa™, to create AI-led experiences across conversational commerce, intelligent discovery, and agentic checkout. The collaboration aims to integrate production-grade AI solutions within core commerce workflows, enhancing customer experience and commercial performance. This partnership marks TCS’ entry into the agentic AI commerce market.

  • TCS partners with Rezolve Ai to scale Agentic Commerce globally.
  • TCS will leverage Rezolve Ai's brainpowa™ platform for AI solutions.
  • Partnership aims to improve customer experience and commercial performance.
  • TCS enters the agentic AI commerce market through this collaboration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [VINYOFL] Vinyoflex: Escrow Payment Mechanism Not Applicable
item.description:
Vinyoflex Ltd clarifies that the requirement for submission of the Escrow Payment Mechanism, as per SEBI regulations, is not applicable to the company. This is because Vinyoflex has not issued any instruments or arrangements that would necessitate the use of the said mechanism under the relevant SEBI Regulations. Therefore, no disclosure or submission is required in this regard.

  • Escrow Payment Mechanism not applicable to Vinyoflex Ltd.
  • Company has not issued instruments requiring the mechanism.
  • No disclosure or submission required under SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINYOFLEX LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SPENTEX] CLC Industries Board Meeting on 20 May 2026
item.description:
CLC Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of a Cost Auditor and an Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The trading window, which was closed on April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 22, 2026, following the board meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled on May 20, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Appointment of Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Appointment of M/s. CNA & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, to May 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPENTEX INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DEVLAB] Dev Labtech: New ISIN After Stock Split - INE0NIJ01025
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dev Labtech Venture Ltd. has announced a new ISIN (INE0NIJ01025) following the sub-division/stock split of its equity shares. Effective from the record date of May 15, 2026, each share with a face value of ₹10 has been split into two shares with a face value of ₹5 each. This information was disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Dev Labtech announces new ISIN: INE0NIJ01025 after stock split.
  • Each ₹10 share split into two ₹5 shares, effective May 15, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd | Category: Split

item.title: [NFL] NFL Appoints Arvind Kumar as Director (Finance)
item.description:
National Fertilizers Ltd (NFL) announced the appointment of Shri Arvind Kumar as Director (Finance) effective May 12, 2026. This follows Order No. 82/3/2013-HR-PSU (Part) (e-31064) issued by the Department of Fertilizers, Ministry of Chemicals & Fertilizers, Government of India on May 8, 2026. Shri Mahesh Chander Gupta ceased to hold the additional charge of Director (Finance) from the same date. Shri Kumar brings extensive experience in financial management, internal audit, and corporate governance from previous roles at Indian Oil Corporation Limited and Hindustan Urvarak & Rasayan Limited.

  • Shri Arvind Kumar appointed as Director (Finance) at NFL, effective 12.05.2026.
  • Shri Mahesh Chander Gupta ceased additional charge of Director (Finance) on 12.05.2026.
  • Arvind Kumar's appointment is for five years or until further orders.
  • Kumar previously held senior finance roles at Indian Oil and Hindustan Urvarak.
  • He brings expertise in financial management, audit, and corporate governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL FERTILIZERS LTD. | Category: Management Change
